summary_text: ### 修正対象 [`scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs) 前提: `phase-evidence.jsonl` は 1 行 1 JSON で `phase` キーを持つ想定で実装しました。provider の多様性判定は `lane.provider` を小文字化して集計しています。 ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff diff --git a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs index ddb2747c..f56d9bfe 100644 --- a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs +++ b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs @@ -27,9 +27,24 @@ const HOME = os.homedir(); const SCRIPT_DIR = path.dirname(new URL(import.meta.url).pathname); const STATE_DIR = path.join(HOME, ".claude", "state"); const CACHE_DIR = path.join(HOME, ".claude", "cache"); +const GUARD_CONFIG_FILE = path.join(HOME, ".claude", "docs", "lane-guard.json"); const PROVIDER_STATE_FILE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "fugue-provider-state.json"); const LANE_RUNS_LOG = path.join(STATE_DIR, "lane-runs.jsonl"); const LANE_OUTPUT_DIR = path.join(CACHE_DIR, "lane-outputs"); +const PHASE_EVIDENCE_FILE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "phase-evidence.jsonl"); +const SAFE_GUARD_DEFAULTS = { + lanes: { + min_active_lanes: 2, + min_distinct_providers: 2, + }, + phase_evidence: { + required_phases: ["plan", "simulate", "critique"], + block_on_missing: true, + }, + blocked_semantics: { + silent_degradation: false, + }, +}; const PROVIDER_SCRIPTS = { codex: { file: "delegate.js", extraArgs: [] }, @@ -45,11 +60,34 @@ const GLM_TO_CODEX_AGENT_MAP = { "refactor-advisor": "architect", }; +function loadGuardConfig() { + const loaded = readJsonSafe(GUARD_CONFIG_FILE, null); + return { + ...SAFE_GUARD_DEFAULTS, + ...(loaded && typeof loaded === "object" ? loaded : {}), + lanes: { + ...SAFE_GUARD_DEFAULTS.lanes, + ...(loaded?.lanes && typeof loaded.lanes === "object" ? loaded.lanes : {}), + }, + phase_evidence: { + ...SAFE_GUARD_DEFAULTS.phase_evidence, + ...(loaded?.phase_evidence && typeof loaded.phase_evidence === "object" ? loaded.phase_evidence : {}), + }, + blocked_semantics: { + ...SAFE_GUARD_DEFAULTS.blocked_semantics, + ...(loaded?.blocked_semantics && typeof loaded.blocked_semantics === "object" ? loaded.blocked_semantics : {}), + }, + }; +} + +const guardConfig = loadGuardConfig(); + function printUsage(exitCode = 1) { console.log(`Usage: node fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --lane provider:agent --task "..." --project /path/to/project node fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --matrix /path/to/matrix.json - node fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --status`); + node fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --status + node fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --health`); process.exit(exitCode); } @@ -60,6 +98,7 @@ function parseArgs(argv) { project: "", matrix: "", status: false, + health: false, timeoutMs: 0, contextFiles: [], }; @@ -84,6 +123,8 @@ function parseArgs(argv) { index += 1; } else if (arg === "--status") { parsed.status = true; + } else if (arg === "--health") { + parsed.health = true; } else if (arg === "--context-files" && next) { parsed.contextFiles = next.split(",").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean); index += 1; @@ -523,6 +564,111 @@ function buildStatusSummary(state) { return summarizeText(lines.join("\n")); } +function validateDiversity(lanes, currentGuardConfig) { + const activeLanes = Array.isArray(lanes) ? lanes : []; + const minActiveLanes = Number(currentGuardConfig?.lanes?.min_active_lanes || 0); + const minDistinctProviders = Number(currentGuardConfig?.lanes?.min_distinct_providers || 0); + const providers = [ + ...new Set(activeLanes.map((lane) => String(lane?.provider || "").trim().toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean)), + ]; + + if (minActiveLanes > 0 && activeLanes.length < minActiveLanes) { + return { + ok: false, + message: `Blocked: guard requires at least ${minActiveLanes} active lanes but matrix defines ${activeLanes.length}.`, + }; + } + + if (minDistinctProviders > 0 && providers.length < minDistinctProviders) { + return { + ok: false, + message: `Blocked: guard requires at least ${minDistinctProviders} disti...
